nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Rust WebAssembly UDF library providing example scalar and table-valued functions such as gcd, sleep, extract_tcp_info, and sum_array for testing embedded WASM UDFs.
nodes.languageNotes: Compiled to wasm32 target; uses arrow_udf procedural macros to expose functions as Arrow UDFs.

nodes.name: extract_tcp_info
nodes.summary: Parses a raw TCP packet byte slice and returns structured source/destination IP and port info.

nodes.summary: Maven build configuration for the remote Java UDF example, declaring risingwave-java-udf and Gson dependencies.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief guide explaining how to build and run the remote Java UDF example server for RisingWave.

nodes.name: UdfExample.java
nodes.summary: Java UDF example server that registers multiple scalar and table-valued functions (gcd, sleep, extract_tcp_info, decimal_add, series, split, etc.) as remote UDFs via Arrow Flight.

nodes.name: UdfExample
nodes.summary: Main class that bootstraps the Arrow Flight UDF server and registers all example UDF implementations.

nodes.summary: Python remote UDF server implementing various scalar and table functions (gcd, sleep, extract_tcp_info, hex_to_dec, etc.) exposed via Arrow Flight for RisingWave UDF testing.
